cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 预算大概 300 到 500，想给客户带一盒白酒礼盒，这周末能先过去看看吗？

mustInclude: anchor the reply in budget and visit timing
guide toward a clear next step without overselling
mustAvoid: pretending the best bottle is already obvious

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 下个月婚礼大概 20 桌，想先看看白酒红酒怎么配，你们这周有时间聊吗？

mustInclude: recognize it as a serious banquet inquiry
ask for date, table count, and rough budget
mustAvoid: assuming every banquet has the same route

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 这款为什么扫码价和你们门店价不一样？有授权吗？

mustInclude: move toward bottle-specific and evidence-based clarification

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 今晚聚餐前想拿两箱啤酒，九点前还能搞定吗？

mustInclude: state that pickup or limited delivery depends on store and timing
guide toward the safest next step
